subcodes.first_line: O dearly cherished friend! Your letter was received and from its contents the utmost joy was obtained. Verily [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عزیز من نامه شما رسید و از مضمون نهایت سرور حاصل گردید فی الحقیقه مرا
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @service to others; to the Cause of God
